posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community

Hope you’re all having a great start to your week!

I’m conducting some research into the current state of this community forum and would love to hear about your experiences.

I’ve created the following super quick survey (it shouldn’t take you longer than a couple minutes to fill out): Customer Community Survey (Community Forum new)

I would love to hear from you all

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julia-monday.com are you open to sharing what you learned from the survey? Would be interested to know what feedback you received, and how you plan to action that.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TheOtherPM

Thanks for your interest! We learned about the main goals and motivations for people joining the community. We understand that we are not doing too badly in almost every variable but that there’s lots of room for improvement too.

I’m excited to share that we are currently working on a plan for revamping the community, taking into account the feedback through this survey amongst other things.

Stay tuned
